overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a nighttime walk along a rocky lakeshore. The player moves steadily forward past fallen trees and rock formations while dark clouds cover the night sky. The atmosphere is moody with high-fidelity game graphics depicting a natural wilderness setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky lakeshore with fallen tree obstruction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky shoreline toward a large fallen tree trunk

entered.detail: large reddish-brown fallen tree trunk lying across the rocky shore
dark calm water of the lake reflecting the night sky
dense green trees and bushes lining the shore
gravel and stone covered ground along the water's edge
rolling hills visible in the background under dark clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, overcast night along a rocky lakeshore. The camera moves forward toward a prominent fallen tree trunk blocking the path ahead. The shoreline is lined with dense vegetation on the left and calm dark water on the right, with distant hills visible under the cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky lakeshore with large boulders and distant settlement view

events.description: passing the fallen tree trunk on the left side
passing a derelict metal boat structure on the left

agents.ego_description: navigating around the fallen tree and continuing along the shore past large rock formations

entered.detail: large gray boulders and rock outcroppings along the water's edge
derelict metal boat or barge wreckage on the shore
small settlement or buildings visible across the lake on the far shore

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the fallen tree and continues along the shore, revealing large rock formations on the right and a derelict metal boat structure on the left. Across the lake, a distant settlement becomes visible on the far shore. The path remains rocky and open as the camera moves steadily forward.

events.description: game UI prompts appear indicating interactable plants nearby

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shore toward denser vegetation while approaching collectible plants

entered.detail: tall leafy tree standing alone on the shore
dense cluster of trees and thick vegetation ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the rock formations into a more open stretch of shore with the distant settlement still visible across the water. Game interface prompts appear indicating nearby interactable plants. The path continues toward a denser cluster of trees as the rocky shore extends into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark, rocky lakeshore that gradually opens up to reveal a distant settlement across the water. It begins by navigating toward a prominent fallen tree trunk that blocks the path, with dense vegetation on the left and calm, dark water on the right under an overcast night sky. As the camera passes the trunk, the terrain shifts to reveal large rock formations and a derelict metal boat structure, while the far shore comes into view. The scene then expands into a more open stretch of shoreline where interactable plants appear along the path, before finally turning toward a denser cluster of trees as the rocky coast extends into the distance.
